name: Mrs. Field's Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300°F (150°C).
2. In a large bowl, beat together the butter and both sugars until smooth.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Stir in the vanilla extract.
5. Gradually add the flour, baking soda, and salt, mixing until just combined.
6. Fold in the chocolate chips.
7. Drop rounded spoonfuls of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
8. Bake for 22 minutes or until edges are lightly browned.
9. Allow cookies to cool completely on the baking sheet before removing them.
